sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25458" key="diaparatribh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαπαρα-τρῐβή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25458.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">constant wrangling,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">1 Ep.Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
